training_status: Working out 3x per week with a personal trainer

benefits.description: Feels full quicker on Tirz but reports no appetite suppression or reduction of food noise
Gained a little muscle per trainer body scan
Only small fat loss in arms, no fat loss elsewhere

protocol_notes: OP ordered Sema from Mochi, waited 6 weeks without shipment, switched to Tirz from another company. Sema arrived ~3 months after cancellation. Eating 1200-1300 calories/day per doctor recommendation of 1400 cal/day. Tracking calories with MyFitnessPal. Trainer does body scans every few weeks. No weight loss after ~2 months on Tirz at 5mg/week. Considering stacking Sema to kickstart weight loss.
